⚽ Scoring basics

Scoring system

Correct result
You predicted the right winner or correctly predicted a draw
+1 pt
Exact score
You got the exact final score right (includes the +1 for correct result)
+4 pts
First goalscorer
You predicted who scored the first goal in the match
+2 pts
Tournament player goal
Your chosen player scores a goal at any point in the tournament
+2 pts per goal
Tournament player assist
Your chosen player provides an assist at any point in the tournament
+1 pt per assist
Tournament player red card
Your chosen player receives a red card
−1 pt
Tournament winner
You correctly predicted the World Cup winner
+15 pts
🔥 Stage multipliers — points double each round!
Group stage ×1
Round of 16 ×2
Quarter-finals ×3
Semi-finals ×4
Final exact=20pts · result=10pts
🃏 Joker card — once per tournament
✅ Correct result
all match pts ×2
❌ Wrong result
0 pts — no penalty
Doubles everything: result + exact score + first scorer
🎰 Double or Nothing — once per week
✅ Correct result
result + exact pts ×2
❌ Wrong result
−1 pt × stage (from total)
⚽ First scorer
always safe either way
Group
−1
R16
−2
QF
−3
SF
−4

Prediction rules

Deadline
All predictions must be submitted at least 1 hour before kickoff (Israel time)
Tournament player
Must be locked in before the first match of the tournament
No changes after deadline
Once the deadline passes, predictions are locked - no edits

Prizes

🥇 1st place *(net of 10% tournament fee)
TBD
🥈 2nd place
TBD
🥉 3rd place
TBD
🎯 The Sniper
TBD

Prize amounts will be announced once all participants have joined. Entry fee: 50 ILS per player. *10% of the 1st place prize goes to the tournament organiser to cover site and tournament maintenance costs.

The Sniper award

The Sniper award goes to the player with the highest prediction accuracy - most exact scores guessed correctly as a percentage of total predictions submitted. If the winner is already in the top 3, the award passes to the next most accurate player not already holding a prize.

🎯 The Sniper

🏅 Group prediction
Before June 10, vote on which player from the group will finish first and last. Votes are secret until the deadline. Winner bragging rights included.
🐂 Bold prediction badge
If you predict a result that nobody else dared to predict and you nail it, the admin can award you the legendary 🐂 badge. Wear it with pride.
🃏 Joker card
Once per tournament, you can activate a Joker on any match before deadline. If your prediction is correct, all points from that match are doubled. If wrong, you still lose nothing extra - the Joker just has no effect.
🎰 Double or Nothing
Once per week, pick any match and go Double or Nothing. Correct = your result and exact score points for that match are doubled. Wrong = those same points are deducted from your total. First scorer points are always safe either way.
🔥 Streak bonus
Get correct predictions in a row and earn a streak bonus! A streak of 3+ correct results earns +1 bonus point per match. A streak of 6+ earns +2 per match. Keep the momentum going!
🎯 Sniper of the Week
Each round, the player with the highest exact score accuracy earns the special "🎯 Sniper of the Week" badge on their profile. The badge rotates each round.
💬 Trash Talk Wall
Send short messages to the whole group - brag, taunt, or trash talk. Keep it fun and friendly! Messages are visible to all players.

🏅 Inner Circle Bets

Vote on who from your group will finish top and who will finish bottom. Just for fun! Votes are secret until June 10.

📺 Watch Together

Vote on which matches you want to watch with the group. Minimum 4 people needed to make it happen!

Welcome to
COED&FOOTBALL 2026
Everything you need to know. No excuses after reading this.
⚽
ניחושים
עוברים לעמוד Matches ומנחשים תוצאה לכל משחק. 24 שעות לפני תחילת המשחק — נסגר. אין חרטות ברגע האחרון.
🎯
מה מרוויחים?
✅ תוצאה נכונה: 3 נקודות
🎯 תוצאה מדויקת: 7 נקודות
🥅 מבקיע ראשון: 5 נקודות
🌟 שחקן טורניר — גול: +2, בישול: +1
🏆 מנצח הגביע: 15 נקודות
🃏
ג'וקר — פעם אחת בטורניר
שמים על משחק אחד — ניחוש נכון = ×2 נקודות. טעיתם? אין עונש. ג'וקר נשרף.
🎰
Double or Nothing — פעם בשבוע
תוצאה נכונה = ×2. תוצאה שגויה = נקודות נגרעות. נקודות המבקיע תמיד בטוחות.
💾
חשוב — לשמור ניחושים
לוחצים על 💾 Save all predictions בראש עמוד המשחקים. אפשר גם להפעיל AutoSave שישמור אוטומטית.
⚡
שלבי נוק-אאוט
שמינית: ×2 · רבע: ×3 · חצי: ×4
גמר: מדויק = 20 נק' · נכון = 10 נק'
🏟️
Coach Room
5 מאמני AI עם אישיות — האנליסט, המיסטיקן, העצבן, הוותיק, המנטרל. שאלו אותם על כל משחק. זמין גם בעברית.
📲
להתקין כאפליקציה
iPhone: Share → Add to Home Screen. Android: תפריט → Install app.
🔐
Step 1 — Sign in with Google
Tap Sign in with Google on the login screen. Only approved members can access the site — if you can't get in, message the admin directly. Don't panic.
🎭
Step 2 — Pick your nickname & avatar
Choose a nickname (this shows on the leaderboard — choose wisely, you'll be living with the shame or glory for 5 weeks) and pick an avatar from the gallery.
⚽
Step 3 — Predict match scores
Go to Matches and predict the score for every game. Tap the +/− buttons to set home and away goals. You must submit at least 1 hour before kickoff — no last-minute betting on the whistle.
🥅
Step 4 — Pick the first goalscorer
For each match, use the dropdown to pick who you think scores first. Worth extra points if you nail it. Wrong pick? No penalty. The bold survive.
🌟
Step 5 — Pick your tournament player & WC winner
Before the tournament starts, pick one player who you think will shine — every goal they score = +2 pts, every assist = +1 pt, red card = −1 pt. Also pick the World Cup winner — correct = 15 pts at the end.
💾
Don't forget to SAVE
Use the 💾 Save all predictions button at the top of the Matches page to save everything at once. Or turn on AutoSave and let the app handle it automatically after each change.
✅
Correct result (W/D/L)
You got who won (or that it was a draw) right, but not the exact score.
+3 points
🎯
Exact score
You nailed it. The exact scoreline. You're either a genius or incredibly lucky.
+7 points (includes the correct result points)
🥅
First goalscorer
You correctly predicted who scored first in the match.
+5 points
🌟
Tournament player
Your chosen player accumulates points throughout the whole tournament.
⚽ Goal: +2 pts  ·  🎯 Assist: +1 pt  ·  🟥 Red card: −1 pt
🏆
World Cup winner pick
Revealed at the end of the tournament.
+15 points if you picked the right nation. Glory reserved for the brave.
⚡
Knockout stage multipliers
As the stakes rise, so do the points:
Round of 16: ×2  ·  Quarter-finals: ×3
Semi-finals: ×4
Final: Exact score = 20 pts · Correct result = 10 pts 🏆
🃏
Joker Card ONCE PER TOURNAMENT
Play your Joker on any one match before it starts. If your prediction is correct, all points for that match are ×2. Wrong? No penalty — the Joker just fizzles out. Choose wisely. Use it on a match you're actually sure about. Or just YOLO it.
🎰
Double or Nothing ONCE PER WEEK
Once per tournament week, pick one match to go double or nothing. Correct result = ×2 result points. Wrong result = those result points are deducted from your total. First goalscorer points are always safe. High risk, high reward. For the mentally unhinged.
🐂
Bold Prediction Badge
The admin awards this to players who made a spectacularly bold prediction that came true — like calling a 3-0 win for the underdog when everyone else picked a draw. Purely honorary. Infinite bragging rights included.
🏟️
Coach Room — AI Coaches
5 AI coaches with unique personalities: The Analyst (data robot), The Mystic (cosmic prophecies), The Hothead (ALWAYS LOUD), The Veteran (grumpy wisdom), The Entertainer (pure chaos). Chat in English or Hebrew. After 10 predictions, they start learning your style and roasting you personally.
💬
Trash Talk Wall
A dedicated wall for talking trash, celebrating wins, and rubbing people's faces in your correct predictions. React with emojis. Keep it competitive. Keep it fun. The admin reserves the right to delete anything that crosses the line into actual war crimes.
👀
Watch Together
For key matches, vote on whether you're coming to watch together or watching from home. Every 5 days the matches rotate to the next set of games. Vote Yes/No — tap again to cancel your vote.
💸
Inner Circle Bets
Special bonus bets that open at specific times during the tournament — separate from the main predictions. The admin controls when they open and close. Stay alert for notifications.
🏠
Home
Your dashboard. See your current rank, points, and the top 10 leaderboard at a glance. Also shows who the group is backing to win the World Cup and your tournament player pick.
⚽
Matches
The main action. Browse by day or view all matches. Set scores, pick first goalscorers, activate your Joker or Double or Nothing. Use Save All to save everything at once, or turn on AutoSave.
🏆
Standings
The full leaderboard with points, exact scores, bonus points, streaks, and badges. Also shows World Cup group tables and top scorers. Refresh anytime for live updates.
📊
My Stats
Your personal breakdown — accuracy rate, correct results, exact scores, points chart, streak, Joker status, Double or Nothing history, and payment status. Your whole tournament story in one page.
📊
Analysis
Three tabs: Heatmap (visual grid of everyone's predictions), Group Odds (see how the group is split on the next 5 matches — are you the contrarian?), and Post-Match (AI breakdown of finished games).
⚔️
Head to Head UNLOCKS JUN 11
Challenge any other player. Pick up to 5 finished matches and see side-by-side who predicted better. Clear verdict. No mercy. Settle the debates once and for all.
🏅
Hall of Fame
Six awards that update as the tournament progresses: 👑 Most Points, 🎯 Sharpest Predictor, 🔥 The Oracle, ⚽ Scorer Hunter, 📋 Most Committed, ⚡ Bonus King. Before Jun 11 — just a countdown. After — your legacy begins.
💡
Tips
Two tabs: AI Tips — AI-generated predictions and insight for upcoming matches. Top Scorers — career international goal tallies for every squad, searchable by player or country. Use it before picking your first goalscorer.
📺
Live
Follow live match stats, lineups, and scores during games. Auto-syncs every 15 minutes. Best used while watching the match.
🎬
Highlights
Catch up on the best moments from each match — goals, saves, drama. Embedded YouTube highlights updated after every game. For when you missed the match or just want to relive the chaos.
📋
Rules
The official rules of the tournament — scoring system, deadlines, prize structure, tiebreakers, and what happens if someone tries to cheat. Read it once. You won't regret it. Ignorance is not an excuse when you lose on a technicality.
🧠 General strategy
Don't just pick favorites to win every game. The scoring system rewards exact scores heavily (+7 vs +3). A bold 2-1 win for the underdog, if correct, beats a safe "home win" call by miles. Take calculated risks.
🃏
When to play your Joker
Save it for a knockout match you're highly confident about — the multipliers are higher there. Playing it in the group stage is valid but you might regret it when the Quarter-finals arrive and you're chasing points.
🎰
Double or Nothing strategy
Don't use it on matches you're unsure about. The result points are deducted if wrong — that can erase gains from 2-3 correct predictions. Use it on mismatches where the outcome feels certain.
🌟
Picking your tournament player
Pick a striker or attacking midfielder from a strong team likely to go deep in the tournament. A great player eliminated in the group stage earns you nothing after week 1. Think Mbappe, Vinicius, Kane, Lamine Yamal.
💡
Use the Tips page
Check the AI Tips and Top Scorers before submitting predictions. The top scorers table shows career international goals per player — useful for picking first goalscorers in matches where you're unsure.
⏰
1-hour deadline warning
You'll receive a notification when a match is coming up that you haven't predicted yet. Don't ignore it — you cannot submit after the deadline. Set AutoSave on and save early to avoid stress.
📲
Install as an app
Add coedworldcup.me to your home screen for the best experience. On iPhone: tap Share → Add to Home Screen. On Android: tap the menu → Install app. Works like a native app, loads faster, and you get notifications.
🍎
iPhone / iPad
Using Safari browser
1
Open coedworldcup.me in Safari (not Chrome!)
2
Tap the Share button ⬆️ at the bottom of the screen
3
Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen" 📱
4
Tap Add — done! The COED⚽ icon will appear on your home screen.
🤖
Android
Using Chrome browser
1
Open coedworldcup.me in Chrome
2
A banner will appear at the bottom: "Add to Home Screen" — tap it
3
If no banner: tap the ⋮ menu → "Add to Home Screen"
4
Tap Install — the app icon will appear on your home screen ✅
💡 Why install it? Fullscreen experience, no browser bar, faster loading, works like a real app — and it takes 30 seconds!

Talk smack. Taunt your friends. All in good fun 😄

Admin panel

⚽
Update results
Enter the final score and first goalscorer after each match. Points calculate and leaderboard updates automatically.
👤
Manage players
View and edit squad lists per match. Data is pulled from the API - fix errors or add missing names here.
👥
Manage users
See who has registered. Approve new participants or remove someone who shouldn't have access.
🏆
Prize settings
Set prize amounts for 1st, 2nd, 3rd and the Sniper. Amounts appear automatically on the Rules page.
📅
Match schedule
Add, edit or remove matches. Set kickoff times (Israel time), group info, and prediction deadlines.
📊
Statistics
Full tournament analytics - accuracy rates, most popular player picks, predicted scorers, group performance.
📦
Predictions backup
Full snapshot of all player predictions before the tournament starts. Use this to manually verify or restore predictions.
💾
Export & Backup
Download full backup of all data — predictions, scores, Joker, DON, players. One click JSON export.
🆕
New members log
See who joined and when, with a full activity log including registration date and actions taken.
📺
Watch Together
Add location options for matches that reached 4+ viewers. Players will then vote on where to meet.
🐂
Bold predictions
Award the 🐂 badge to players who made a brave prediction and nailed it.
🧹
Trash Talk reset
Delete all messages or messages older than a chosen number of days.
🏅
Inner Circle Bets
Enable or disable the Inner Circle Bets page. Open it once the final player count is confirmed.
💰
Payment tracker
Mark who paid their 50 ILS entry fee. Players can see their payment status in My Stats.
🖼️
Avatar Requests
Approve players who want to change their avatar again.
0
⚡
Knockout stages
Enable predictions for Round of 16, Quarter-finals, Semi-finals and Final once the group stage is done.
📢
Updates
Post daily update graphics shown in the Updates page. Upload image URL from GitHub and set a date/title.
⚽
WC Scorers Table
Manage the World Cup top scorers table shown in Standings. Add/edit manually or auto-fetch from the web.
🔍
Score verification
Check that all points are calculated correctly. Compare predicted vs actual results and audit per player.
📋
Picks overview
See who picked which tournament player and World Cup winner. Verify everyone submitted before June 10.
🃏
Joker & DON overview
See which players activated their Joker card and Double or Nothing bets this tournament.
✅
Player readiness
Quick overview of every player — who picked their winner, tournament player, filled predictions, scorers, Joker & DON.
🏟️
Squad Editor
View and edit player squads for all 48 teams. Add or remove players from the first goalscorer lists.

✅ Player Readiness Overview

Quick check — who's ready and who's missing something.
